raw_consumer_statement:
I requested a refund of {$100.00} from XXXX on XX/XX/XXXX and was told several times over chat that they would give me a refund. I received an email on XX/XX/XXXX confirming the refund. When I didnt receive the refund I disputed the charge with Citibank Mastercard ( CBMC ). I was told by CBMC it would take 90 days to investigate and they would contact the merchant. 

When I spoke over the phone with a rep in CBMCs dispute dept, I explained the credit card number that was used by XXXX was an expired virtual number that I also had closed at least 6 months prior. As far as XXXX concerned, Citibank allowed a fraudulent charge. I was told I had to file a dispute of the charge. 

In the meantime I contacted XXXX and told them they told me they would refund my account for the full amount but still wasnt refunded. Finally I got someone at XXXX who said they would put the refund through again. However when I still didnt see a refund a couple of weeks later on my credit card, I contacted XXXX again and was told Citibank blocked the refund because of my impending dispute. XXXX told me if I dropped the dispute they could process the refund. Stupidly I trusted XXXX. After I cancelled the dispute with Citibank as instructed by XXXX, the Citibank website stated the dispute was resolved and I was responsible for the charge. 

Several days later I contacted XXXX to request they process the refund again, however they still claimed Citibank was blocking them from refunding the money. 

I contacted CBMC again to request that they reopen the dispute with XXXX and I emailed evidence ( the email from XXXX stating they refunded the money ) to CBMC disputes in XXXX, in addition to including Citibank on a 3 way phone call with XXXX so CBMC would have verbal proof from XXXX that they said they were being blocked by CBMC from refunding the {$100.00}. 

I can produce screenshots of chats with Citibank and proof of numerous phone calls with Citibank and XXXX if needed. 

I provided the last 4 numbers of my CBMC account number. I do not want to provide the entire number due to so much fraud and hacking going on these days
